name: Lesson Learned
description: Mistake + what I learned format for vulnerability and connection. Storytelling drives highest dwell time.

variables.name: confession
variables.description: Opening admission — first 210 chars before 'see more'. E.g. 'I made a mistake that cost me 100K...'

variables.name: mistake
variables.description: What went wrong and why — be honest and specific

variables.name: lesson
variables.description: What you learned from it — the real value for the reader

variables.name: advice
variables.description: Actionable advice + engagement question. E.g. 'What's the biggest lesson you learned the hard way?'

tips: Vulnerability builds trust — but always include the lesson
Specific numbers make confessions more real and compelling
This format drives the highest quality comments
Keep it 1300-1600 chars for optimal engagement
